name: paper
description: /paper <args> — arxiv-style LaTeX paper scaffolder (v0.10 — PAPER.tape roster). Verbs: list [--sync] · set <slug> · show [<slug>] · goal <text> · title <text> · ms <text> · done <match> · todo <text> · new <slug> · sample [<name>] [<dest>] · samples · monograph-init <slug> [N] · fill <letter> · fig <size> <prompt> <out.png> · compile [dir] · lint [dir] · companion {init|sync} · outline [dir] · pipeline ... · atoms <domain> · verify-block ... · bib add <id> · pr-roll <repo> <since> · arxiv-prep [<dir>] · help. v0.10 adds a DOMAINS.tape-style roster — PAPER.tape (slug → dir) at repo root + per-paper PAPER.md (snapshot: @title · @goal · `- [ ]` milestones) + PAPER.log.md (append-only step log); progress/title read LIVE from PAPER.md so the roster never churns on flip. new/sample/monograph-init auto-register + scaffold. bare /paper shows the active paper. Old `list` (bundled samples) is now `samples`. v0.9 monograph mode preserved (monograph-init scaffolds \appendix + N appendix stubs + companion/; fill per-appendix runbook; lint auto-tier paper/monograph; companion sync). FOUR bundled samples: sample-nb-bcs-absorbed · sample-fusion-7gate · sample-cost-routing · sample-blue-max.
